name: Design on Track
address: 42 Church Street, Cape Town City Centre, 8001
description: Design on Track is a Cape Town-based practice specialising in residential and small-scale commercial projects. We focus on sustainable design and local materials, with a strong track record in coastal and inland residential work across the Western Cape.

name: Bloch Studio Architects
description: Bloch Studio is a design-led practice working across residential, hospitality and mixed-use. We combine technical rigour with a hands-on approach to delivery, and have experience in both UK and South African projects.

name: Design on Track UK
address: Unit 7, Riverside Studios, 1 Crisp Road, London, W6 9RL
description: Design on Track UK works with developers and private clients on residential and small commercial schemes in London and the South East. We offer full architectural services from concept through to completion.
